name: QUANTUM CORP /DE/
business: Quantum delivers end-to-end data management solutions for unstructured data in the AI era. Products include primary and secondary storage software/systems, devices/media, and services. It sells to hyperscale, technology, media, government, life sciences, healthcare, and financial industries, as well as through OEMs, distributors, and resellers.

exposures.sentence: Quantum delivers end-to-end data management solutions designed for unstructured data in the artificial intelligence ("AI") era.
Scalar tape storage systems are used by the world s largest hyperscalers as well as thousands of enterprises worldwide.
Scalar Tape Storage : Low-cost, secure storage for long-term data archiving and offline data protection.

tamClaims.claim: Unstructured data represents more than 80% of all data being created.
tamClaims.sentence: Unstructured data represents more than 80% of all data being created according to leading industry analyst firms.
